components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; width: 100%; min-height: 52px; background: #26314f; color: #faf8f5; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; padding: 10px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1a2340; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #eef0f5; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; min-height: 48px; background: transparent; color: #1c1b19; border: 1px solid rgba(28, 27, 25, 0.12); border-radius: 12px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; padding: 10px 16px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f7f5f1; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #eef0f5; }

components.name: AI Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ai { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; min-height: 48px; background: #5b4fd6; color: #fff; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; padding: 10px 16px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ai:hover { filter: brightness(0.95); } .ds-btn-ai:disabled { opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #6b6352; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #f7f5f1; border: 1px solid rgba(28, 27, 25, 0.12); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #1c1b19; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #26314f; background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #eef0f5; }

components.name: Status Tag
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-tag-done { background: #eef0f5; color: #26314f; }

components.name: Intervention Card
components.description: CR card under a client group.
components.html:
Aujourd'hui · 09:15

Remplacement du groupe de sécurité…
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(28, 27, 25, 0.12); border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px; } .ds-card-date { font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 650; font-size: 13px; color: #1c1b19; } .ds-card-desc { margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; color: #4a4437; }

components.name: Bottom Nav
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 4px; padding: 8px 12px; background: #fff; border-top: 1px solid rgba(28, 27, 25, 0.12); } .ds-nav-item { flex: 1; min-height: 48px; border: 0; background: transparent; color: #6b6352; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-item.active { color: #26314f; }

narrative.overview: L’interface est un carnet de terrain numérique : pages courtes, écriture nette, navy sérieux, papier clair. Elle sert l’artisan qui a une main libre et deux minutes — pas un dashboard SaaS.
keyCharacteristics: Shell mobile max 480px, nav bas + FAB micro
Une famille typo (Outfit), hiérarchie par poids
Accent navy ≤10 % surface ; violet AI réservé au bouton Optimiser

rules.name: The One Navy Rule
rules.body: Le primary navy occupe ≤10 % d’un écran.

rules.name: The Sunlight Rule
rules.body: Texte body et labels lisibles sur papier en lumière forte.

dos: Do garder les CTA primaires pleine largeur ≥48px dans le flux chantier.
Do parler métier (fiche, compte rendu, zone, Terminé).
Do montrer l’état système (enregistrement, pause, transcription, toast).
Do grouper le journal par client avant les CR.
donts: Don't faire des dashboards SaaS “hero metrics”.
Don't adopter l’esthétique AI purple / glow / glassmorphism hors Optimiser.
Don't basculer en landing crème + serif éditorial.
Don't cloner WhatsApp / messagerie comme coquille UX.
Don't empiler une densité type ERP.
Don't utiliser une border-left accent >1px comme stripe.
Don't partager des URLs blob: comme liens PDF.
